steps.title: Use the altered-version figure
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize how many participants selected an altered version of Fred Flintstone. The relevant note is the 13.1% figure, not the percentage that selected the unaltered image.

steps.title: Reject missing or opposite data
steps.content:
• Choice A emphasizes the 86.9% who selected the unaltered image.
  • Choice B describes the study setup but gives no altered-version percentage.
  • Choice C states what participants were asked to do but includes no data about their selections.
The answer is D.
